data.title: Boys & Girls Clubs of America Inducts 2026 Alumni Hall of Fame Class During Powerful Celebration of Impact
data.description: In Atlanta last night, Boys & Girls Clubs of America hosted a special event to honor the 2026 Alumni Hall of Fame class, comprising of individuals whose notable accomplishments stem from their time as Club members. This year's inductees were celebrated at a ceremony in Charlotte, North Carolina, bringing together leaders, alumni, and supporters nationwide. The event showcased the significant impact of Boys & Girls Clubs, highlighting the achievements of this year's honorees.

data.title: Times of India Internet Launches 'Diaspora Dialogues' -- A New Podcast Celebrating South Asian Excellence, Hosted by Sujatha Padmanabhan
data.description: On May 1, 2026, Times Internet, the leading digital products company in India, revealed the introduction of Diaspora Dialogues. This new venture is a bi-weekly video podcast that showcases candid discussions with South Asian innovators who are influencing culture, commerce, and artistic endeavors.

data.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp Exxon Mobil Expectations Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
data.description: Exxon Mobil Corporation (NYSE: XOM) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings on May 1, with analysts predicting earnings of $1.01 per share, a decrease from the previous year's $1.76 per share. The expected revenue for the quarter is $85.29 billion, compared to last year's $83.13 billion. The company anticipates a decrease in upstream earnings of $300 million to $500 million due to Middle East disruptions. Exxon Mobil's stock closed at $154.33 on Thursday, marking a 0.2% decrease. For further details, including the latest analyst ratings, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Geviti Featured on Health Uncensored with Dr. Drew, Showcasing AI-Powered Preventative Health Platform
data.description: In Phoenix, Geviti Health, a precision health platform emphasizing preventative care, was showcased on Health Uncensored with Dr. Drew, a widely broadcast health TV show hosted by Dr. Drew Pinsky. The feature spotlights Geviti's AI-driven method for analyzing blood biomarkers and providing personalized health advice. This comes after Geviti launched a groundbreaking free AI platform for health data interpretation.

data.title: Expereo Ranked One of the 2026 Best Workplaces in UAE by Great Place to Work® Middle East
data.description: Expereo has been recognized as one of the Best Workplaces in the UAE by Great Place to Work®. This list was compiled based on feedback from thousands of employees in the Middle East, making it the largest collection of employee experiences in the region. The evaluation considered factors such as trust, innovation, company values, and leadership. This acknowledgment highlights Expereo's commitment to creating a positive workplace culture in the UAE.

data.title: Best Reddit Marketing Agency (May 2026): Nicely Network Awarded by Expert Consumers
data.description: On May 1, 2026, Expert Consumers announced Nicely Network as the top Reddit Marketing Agency for May 2026. Nicely Network has been recognized for its outstanding efforts in assisting brands in achieving high visibility on Reddit, Google Search, and prominent AI answer platforms. This prestigious award acknowledges Nicely Network's excellence in the industry.

data.title: Twilio Stock Surges Over 18% In Overnight Trading: Here's Why
data.description: Twilio Inc. stocks (NYSE: TWLO) have shown significant growth with a surge of 18.84% to $175.96 following the release of their first-quarter results. The company exceeded analyst expectations in both earnings per share and revenue. In Q1, Twilio reported revenue of $1.41 billion, a 20% increase year-over-year, surpassing the estimated $1.34 billion by 4.86%, with organic revenue growth at 16%. GAAP income from operations saw a substantial 366% rise to $107.7 million. Non-GAAP diluted EPS for the California-based company also increased to $1.50, surpassing the estimated $1.13 by 32.74%. Twilio noted a Dollar-Based Net Expansion Rate of 114%, up from 107% last year, indicating improved customer monetization through upgrades, cross-sells, downgrades, and churn. CEO Khozema Shipchandler highlighted the first quarter as a significant period for Twilio, achieving the highest revenue and gross profit growth rates.

data.title: Bekaert finalizes purchase of Bridgestone's tire cord business in China and Thailand, boosting its presence in the region.
data.description: In recent reports, it has been disclosed that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4%, which is the lowest it has been in the last decade. This decline in unemployment has led to an increase in job opportunities, with over 500,000 new jobs being created in various sectors. Additionally, the stock market has shown significant growth, with the main index reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. Experts believe that these positive economic indicators are a result of the government's efforts to stimulate the economy through various policy measures.

data.title: Elon Musk Says Most Cryptocurrencies Are 'Scams,' While Some Have 'Merit' During OpenAI Trial: Report
data.description: During the OpenAI trial on Thursday, Elon Musk reportedly labeled most cryptocurrencies as deceptive schemes. Tech reporter Mike Isaac quoted Musk's testimony at the Federal Courthouse in downtown Oakland, where Musk described cryptocurrencies to the jury. Musk stated, "Some of them have value, but most are fraudulent." The statement came following a query about OpenAI's intention to utilize an Initial Coin Offering (ICO) for fundraising in 2018. This indicates Musk's skepticism towards ICOs at that time. The news can be accessed in detail on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Beyond Meat Stock Is Trending Overnight: Here's What You Should Know
data.description: Beyond Meat Inc. (NASDAQ: BYND) saw its shares rise by 2.63% to $1.01 in after-hours trading on Thursday night, following a 20.70% surge during the trading day, closing at $0.98, as per data from Benzinga Pro. The plant-based protein company is set to announce its first-quarter 2026 financial results on May 6 after the market closes. Analysts are predicting a first-quarter loss of 11 cents per share, with revenue expected to be $58.01 million. This upcoming report comes after a challenging fourth quarter of 2025, where BYND reported a loss of 29 cents per share, missing analysts' estimates by 163.64%. Additional details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Bitcoin's rally seems to be losing strength as repeated profit-taking near $77,000 hindered it from reaching $80,000.
data.description: Every time Bitcoin surged past $77,000, short-term traders cashed out to lock in gains, causing selling pressure that prevented Bitcoin from breaking the $80,000 mark.
